description.ru: Startup, monitoring, maintenance, shutdown и incidents.
description.en: Startup, monitoring, maintenance, shutdown and incidents.

rows.ru: Device count, KeyPackage inventory, Welcome/commit state
rows.en: Device count, KeyPackage inventory, Welcome/commit state

ru: Перевести readiness в 503.
Остановить новое work и drain workers.
Закрыть Socket.IO/HTTP.
Flush storage queue и закрыть SQLite.
Опубликовать stopped snapshot без повторного открытия store.
en: Set readiness to 503.
Stop new work and drain workers.
Close Socket.IO/HTTP.
Flush the storage queue and close SQLite.
Publish a stopped snapshot without reopening the store.

text.ru: Read-only должен отклонять все mutations стабильной ошибкой, оставляя authorised reads. Он не заменяет backup/restore и не допускает background bypass.
text.en: Read-only must reject all mutations with a stable error while preserving authorised reads. It does not replace backup/restore and permits no background bypass.

description.ru: Verified SQLite backup, off-host copies и controlled restore.
description.en: Verified SQLite backup, off-host copies and controlled restore.

ru: Confirm integrity и enter maintenance/read-only if required.
Checkpoint WAL через supported backup path.
Создать encrypted verified backup и проверить metadata/readability.
Сохранить минимум одну off-host copy и отдельно защитить passphrase.
Записать version, schema, time и operator.
en: Confirm integrity and enter maintenance/read-only if required.
Checkpoint WAL through the supported backup path.
Create an encrypted verified backup and check metadata/readability.
Keep at least one off-host copy and protect the passphrase separately.
Record version, schema, time and operator.

title.en: Do not copy an active SQLite file

text.ru: Manual filesystem copy активной DB не является поддерживаемым backup procedure.
text.en: A manual filesystem copy of the active database is not a supported backup procedure.

ru: Остановить traffic/process и сохранить evidence failed state.
Выбрать verified backup и restore через supported path.
Запустить isolated/controlled и проверить integrity/schema.
Проверить users, rooms, messages, files, audit, Trust и Pulse state.
Проверить live/ready и только затем открыть traffic.
en: Stop traffic/process and preserve failed-state evidence.
Select a verified backup and restore through the supported path.
Start isolated/controlled and verify integrity/schema.
Verify users, rooms, messages, files, audit, Trust and Pulse state.
Verify live/ready and only then reopen traffic.

description.ru: Диагностика startup, Trust, uploads, updater и Pulse failures.
description.en: Diagnosing startup, Trust, upload, updater and Pulse failures.

ru: Client/Server/Cloud version, tag, commit и distribution classification.
Server ID, request IDs, timestamps и network profile.
live/ready, schema/integrity, storage/backup state.
Sanitized error codes/logs без cookies, content, tokens, keys или complete MLS state.
en: Client/Server/Cloud version, tag, commit and distribution classification.
Server ID, request IDs, timestamps and network profile.
live/ready, schema/integrity, storage/backup state.
Sanitised error codes/logs without cookies, content, tokens, keys or complete MLS state.

rows.ru: Active verified group device online, no ban, no early retry before Retry-After, scoped event delivered
rows.en: Active verified group device online, no ban, no early retry before Retry-After, scoped event delivered

rows.ru: Actual ciphertext size/SHA-256, scope, state, room policy, quota, no reuse
rows.en: Actual ciphertext size/SHA-256, scope, state, room policy, quota, no reuse

rows.ru: Official provider/feed, tag/assets, signature, installer/blockmap/latest.yml, no downgrade
rows.en: Official provider/feed, tag/assets, signature, installer/blockmap/latest.yml, no downgrade

rows.ru: Core messaging remains available, cached entitlement still valid, bounded worker retry
rows.en: Core messaging remains available, cached entitlement still valid, bounded worker retry

ru: Severity/impact, detection time и affected versions.
Sanitized timeline, containment и data/security impact.
Root cause, correction, tests, migration/rollback и remaining risk.
en: Severity/impact, detection time and affected versions.
Sanitised timeline, containment and data/security impact.
Root cause, correction, tests, migration/rollback and remaining risk.
